columns.Name: REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Part of the Primary Key for this table. Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: SOURCE_LANG
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language in which the contents of the translatable columns were originally created.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores the Title for this Requisition. This is the title that is published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores the Manager Title for this Requisition. This title is only used internally by the hiring manager, it is not meant to be published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_DESC_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the Internal Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_DESC_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the Internal Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_SHORT_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the External Short Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_SHORT_DESC
columns.Comments: Stores the Internal Short Description for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_RESP
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_RESP_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_RESP
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the Internal Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_RESP_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the Internal Responsibilities for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_QUAL
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the External Qualifications for this Requisition.

columns.Name: EXTERNAL_QUAL_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the External Qualifications for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_QUAL
columns.Comments: Stores the html-free version of the Internal Qualifications for this Requisition.

columns.Name: INTERNAL_QUAL_HTML
columns.Comments: Stores the html version of the Internal Qualifications for this Requisition.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: This name is only used internally as the identifier.  This is not unique.  It is not meant to be published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
